title: Ceramic Blue Tile
description: Premium ceramic tile with deep ocean blue glaze finish. Perfect for modern bathrooms and kitchens. Durable, water-resistant, and designed for long-lasting shine with elegant aesthetic appeal.

title: Marble White Elegance
description: Luxury marble tile with pure white surface and natural stone veins. Ideal for premium interior decoration, giving a clean and classy look to floors and walls with timeless beauty and long durability.

title: Rustic Brown Stone
description: Rustic stone tile with earthy brown tones and rough texture. Perfect for outdoor pathways, garden walls, and natural themed interiors. Strong, durable, and weather resistant for long-term usage.

title: Modern Geometric Tile
description: Modern geometric patterned tile with bold shapes and artistic design. Ideal for feature walls, creative interiors, and stylish modern spaces with eye-catching visual appeal and unique structure.

title: Classic Beige Tile
description: Elegant beige tile designed for minimal interiors. Warm neutral tone suitable for living rooms, offices, and hotel spaces. Smooth finish with long-lasting durability and timeless aesthetic.

title: Black Matte Luxury
description: Premium matte black tile with smooth luxury finish. Perfect for modern high-end interiors, providing bold contrast and elegant dark aesthetic for walls, floors, and decorative spaces.

title: Ocean Wave Tile
description: Wave-inspired tile design with flowing blue patterns. Creates calming ocean effect, perfect for bathrooms, spa rooms, and relaxing interior environments with soothing visual impact.

title: Golden Luxury Marble
description: Luxury marble tile with golden streak patterns and premium polish. Ideal for villas, hotels, and royal interiors. Gives rich, elegant, and premium appearance with high durability.

title: Grey Industrial Tile
description: Industrial style grey tile with concrete texture finish. Perfect for modern lofts, offices, and minimalist interiors. Strong, durable, and designed for raw architectural aesthetic.

title: Vintage Pattern Tile
description: Classic vintage patterned tile inspired by European design heritage. Perfect for cafes, artistic interiors, and decorative walls with timeless traditional aesthetic appeal.

title: Forest Green Tile
description: Nature-inspired green tile with deep forest tone. Perfect for eco-friendly interiors, garden walls, and natural themed designs with calming and refreshing atmosphere.

title: Minimal White Gloss
description: Ultra minimal white glossy tile designed for modern interiors. Reflects light beautifully, creating bright and spacious environment with clean aesthetic design and smooth finish.

title: Brick Style Tile
description: Brick texture tile designed for wall decoration. Ideal for cafes, restaurants, and industrial style interiors. Gives raw urban aesthetic with strong visual presence.

title: Blue Gradient Tile
description: Gradient tile blending multiple shades of blue. Creates dynamic artistic effect on walls and floors. Perfect for modern creative interior designs with visual depth.

title: Luxury Gold Pattern
description: Elegant gold patterned tile with premium shine and detailed textures. Perfect for luxury interiors, feature walls, and royal themed decorative projects.

title: Soft Pink Tile
description: Soft pink elegant tile for modern feminine interiors. Perfect for bathrooms, dressing rooms, and decorative spaces with calm aesthetic and smooth finish.

title: Dark Slate Tile
description: Deep slate stone tile with strong rugged texture. Ideal for outdoor flooring, industrial interiors, and heavy-duty architectural applications.

title: Wood Finish Tile
description: Wood texture tile combining natural wood look with ceramic durability. Perfect for warm interior flooring with long-lasting performance and aesthetic appeal.

title: Art Mosaic Tile
description: Colorful mosaic tile with artistic small patterns. Perfect for creative walls, decorative interiors, and artistic feature sections with vibrant design.

title: Soft Grey Marble
description: Elegant grey marble tile with natural veins and soft polished finish. Perfect for modern luxury interiors and calm aesthetic environments.

title: Sunset Orange Tile
description: Warm sunset orange tile adding energetic and vibrant atmosphere. Perfect for creative interiors, feature walls, and artistic decoration setups.

title: Diamond Pattern Tile
description: Geometric diamond patterned tile with sharp elegant design. Perfect for modern luxury flooring and stylish artistic interior decoration.

title: Ocean Marble Mix
description: Unique marble mix combining ocean blue and white textures. Designed for premium artistic interiors with luxurious fusion style and elegant finish.

title: Stone Brick Grey
description: Grey brick stone tile designed for industrial walls. Strong durable material suitable for both indoor and outdoor architectural applications.

title: Premium White Marble Glow
description: Ultra premium white marble tile with polished glowing surface. Perfect for luxury homes, hotels, and high-end interior decoration projects.
